market_pulse: Weekend peak: David Guetta at LIV Beach, major talent across Zouk (Lil Tunechi), Hakkasan (Justin Credible), and OMNIA (Cedric Gervais) driving high engagement; Kygo/Palm Tree launch momentum building.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: David Guetta headline at LIV Beach (Saturday)
Multiple A-tier talent across Strip (Zouk, OMNIA, Hakkasan)
Strong IG/TT engagement on LIV posts (591+ likes, high comments)
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize LIV Beach David Guetta push; secondary promotion to Hakkasan/OMNIA guests mentioning LIV nightclub after-parties. Story countdown + reels with guest DJs.

content_gaps.description: Zouk @snoopdogg, @rlgrime, @liltunechi generating major organic reach; LIV not leveraging similar mid-tier talent collabs in same frequency
